# tplinkeasysmart_port_bandwidth_control (Resource)

Manage one switch port's ingress and egress bandwidth-control rates.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tplinkeasysmart_port_bandwidth_control" "port2" {
  port_id           = 2
  ingress_rate_kbps = 100000
  egress_rate_kbps  = 50000
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `egress_rate_kbps` (Number) Egress rate limit in Kbps. Set to `0` for unlimited.
- `ingress_rate_kbps` (Number) Ingress rate limit in Kbps. Set to `0` for unlimited.
- `port_id` (Number) Physical switch port number.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier derived from port_id.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = tplinkeasysmart_port_bandwidth_control.port2
  id = "2"
}

resource "tplinkeasysmart_port_bandwidth_control" "port2" {
  port_id           = 2
  ingress_rate_kbps = 100000
  egress_rate_kbps  = 50000
}
```
